{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "View licences" %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% set pageName="Licence number " + licence.number %} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ text: "Back to licences", href: "/external/licences" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}

{{ pageName }}

{% set summaryHtml %}

Summary

{{ govukSummaryList({ rows: [ { key: { text: "Licence name" }, value: { html: licence.name if licence.name else "No name chosen
Name this licence" } }, { key: { text: "Licence holder" }, value: { html: licence.holder + "
View licence contact details" } }, { key: { text: "Licence version start date" }, value: { text: licence.startDate } }, { key: { text: "Licence version issue date" }, value: { text: licence.issueDate } }, { key: { text: "End date" }, value: { text: licence.endDate } }, { key: { text: "Source of supply" }, value: { text: licence.source } }, { key: { text: "Purposes" }, value: { text: licence.purpose | join(", ") if licence.purpose else "" } }, { key: { text: "Periods of abstraction" }, value: { text: licence.periodStart + " to " + licence.periodEnd } }, { key: { text: "Points of abstraction" }, value: { html: (licence.absPoints | join("
")) if licence.absPoints else "" } }, { key: { text: "Monitoring station" }, value: { text: licence.monitoringStation } }, { key: { text: "Abstraction conditions" }, value: { text: licence.conditions | join(", ") if licence.conditions else "" } }, { key: { text: "Abstraction amounts" }, value: { text: licence.absQuantities } }, { key: { text: "Billing region" }, value: { text: licence.billingRegion } } ] }) }} {{ govukInsetText({ text: "The information included in this service does not replace or affect the legal (paper) copy of the licence issued to you. The information must be used for reference only. You must refer to and comply with the licence issued to you as a paper copy when you make decisions about abstracting or impounding water.", classes: "govuk-!-margin-top-9 govuk-!-width-two-thirds" }) }} {{ govukDetails({ summaryText: "Is your licence information correct?", html: "To help us improve our new service, please let us know if you find any errors in the licence information we are showing you. You can contact us by:

Email: enquiries@environment-agency.gov.uk

Telephone: 03708 506 506

Telephone from outside the UK: +44 114 282 5312

You can call us from 8am to 6pm, Monday to Friday." }) }} {% endset -%} {% set pastDayHtml %} {% endset -%} {% set returnsHtml %}

Returns

{{ govukTable({ head: [ { text: "Case manager" }, { text: "Cases opened" }, { text: "Cases closed" } ], rows: [ [ { text: "David Francis" }, { text: "24" }, { text: "18" } ], [ { text: "Paul Farmer" }, { text: "16" }, { text: "20" } ], [ { text: "Rita Patel" }, { text: "24" }, { text: "27" } ] ] }) }} {% endset -%} {% set communicationsHtml %}

Communications

{{ govukTable({ head: [ { text: "Case manager" }, { text: "Cases opened" }, { text: "Cases closed" } ], rows: [ [ { text: "David Francis" }, { text: "98" }, { text: "95" } ], [ { text: "Paul Farmer" }, { text: "122" }, { text: "131" } ], [ { text: "Rita Patel" }, { text: "126" }, { text: "142" } ] ] }) }} {% endset -%} {{ govukTabs({ items: [ { label: "Summary", id: "Summary", panel: { html: summaryHtml } }, { label: "Returns", id: "Returns", panel: { html: returnsHtml } }, { label: "Communications", id: "Communications", panel: { html: communicationsHtml } } ] }) }}
{% endblock %}
